test.create_query: CREATE TABLE wide_table_nested_select ( c0 UInt64, c1 UInt64, c2 UInt64, c3 UInt64, c4 UInt64, c5 UInt64, c6 UInt64, c7 UInt64, c8 UInt64, c9 UInt64, c10 UInt64, c11 UInt64, c12 MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.query: EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM wide_table_nested_select))) FORMAT Null

EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM wide_table_nested_select)))))))))) FORMAT Null

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM wide_table_nested_select)))))))))) FORMAT Null
